'''âch-l-l''' ('''kachalal''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yegg|yegg]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-l-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yegg|yegg]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âch-l-l
|-
! Lemma
| kachalal
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichalal|thichalal]] || [[word:jichalal|jichalal]] || [[word:shichalal|shichalal]] || [[word:kichalal|kichalal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchalal|thuthuchalal]] || [[word:jujuchalal|jujuchalal]] || [[word:shushuchalal|shushuchalal]] || [[word:kukuchalal|kukuchalal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchalal|thuchalal]] || [[word:juchalal|juchalal]] || [[word:shuchalal|shuchalal]] || [[word:kuchalal|kuchalal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchalal|thuchalal]] || [[word:juchalal|juchalal]] || [[word:shuchalal|shuchalal]] || [[word:kuchalal|kuchalal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thechalal|thechalal]] || [[word:jechalal|jechalal]] || [[word:shechalal|shechalal]] || [[word:kechalal|kechalal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothochalal|thothochalal]] || [[word:jojochalal|jojochalal]] || [[word:shoshochalal|shoshochalal]] || [[word:kokochalal|kokochalal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochalal|thochalal]] || [[word:jochalal|jochalal]] || [[word:shochalal|shochalal]] || [[word:kochalal|kochalal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochalal|thochalal]] || [[word:jochalal|jochalal]] || [[word:shochalal|shochalal]] || [[word:kochalal|kochalal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠchalal|thĂŠchalal]] || [[word:jĂŠchalal|jĂŠchalal]] || [[word:shĂŠchalal|shĂŠchalal]] || [[word:kĂŠchalal|kĂŠchalal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachalal|thathachalal]] || [[word:jajachalal|jajachalal]] || [[word:shashachalal|shashachalal]] || [[word:kakachalal|kakachalal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachalal|thachalal]] || [[word:jachalal|jachalal]] || [[word:shachalal|shachalal]] || [[word:kachalal|kachalal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachalal|thachalal]] || [[word:jachalal|jachalal]] || [[word:shachalal|shachalal]] || [[word:kachalal|kachalal]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shachalal|shachalal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshachalal|goshachalal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishachalal|gokishachalal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shachalalnĂŒ|shachalalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshachalalnknĂŒ|goshachalalnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishachalalnĂŒ|gokishachalalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shachalalshĂ«|shachalalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshachalalnkshĂ«|goshachalalnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishachalalshĂ«|gokishachalalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachalalro|shachalalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachalalnkro|goshachalalnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachalalro|gokishachalalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shachalalmu|shachalalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachalalnkmu|goshachalalnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachalalmu|gokishachalalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shachalalsher|shachalalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshachalalnksher|goshachalalnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishachalalsher|gokishachalalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shachalalng|shachalalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshachalalnkng|goshachalalnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishachalalng|gokishachalalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shachalalya|shachalalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshachalalnkya|goshachalalnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishachalalya|gokishachalalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shachalalyam|shachalalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshachalalnkyam|goshachalalnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishachalalyam|gokishachalalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachalalnĂŒshĂ«|shachalalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachalalnknĂŒshĂ«|goshachalalnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachalalnĂŒshĂ«|gokishachalalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachalalnĂŒro|shachalalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachalalnknĂŒro|goshachalalnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachalalnĂŒro|gokishachalalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachalalnĂŒmu|shachalalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachalalnknĂŒmu|goshachalalnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachalalnĂŒmu|gokishachalalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachalalshĂ«nĂŒ|shachalalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachalalnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshachalalnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachalalshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishachalalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachalalshĂ«ro|shachalalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachalalnkshĂ«ro|goshachalalnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachalalshĂ«ro|gokishachalalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachalalshĂ«mu|shachalalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachalalnkshĂ«mu|goshachalalnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachalalshĂ«mu|gokishachalalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachalalronĂŒ|shachalalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachalalnkronĂŒ|goshachalalnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachalalronĂŒ|gokishachalalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachalalroshĂ«|shachalalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachalalnkroshĂ«|goshachalalnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachalalroshĂ«|gokishachalalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachalalromu|shachalalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachalalnkromu|goshachalalnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachalalromu|gokishachalalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachalalmunĂŒ|shachalalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachalalnkmunĂŒ|goshachalalnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachalalmunĂŒ|gokishachalalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachalalmushĂ«|shachalalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachalalnkmushĂ«|goshachalalnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachalalmushĂ«|gokishachalalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachalalmuro|shachalalmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachalalnkmuro|goshachalalnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachalalmuro|gokishachalalmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
